chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1724 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.8570/2025 2. For hearing of main case 07.05.2025 Mr. Nadir Hussain Abro, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Shamshad Ahmed advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent which is taken on record. This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceedings initiated by the respondent Department, during the pendency of the appeal before the Commissioner (Appeals-I), Sindh Revenue Board, Karachi. The respective learned counsel jointly state that it may be just and proper to dispose of this petition with directions for expeditious conclusion of the appeal, while restraining the recovery of the impugned demand in the interim period. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner (Appeals-I) Sindh Revenue Board Karachi, to decide the pending Appeal expeditiously; preferably within 60 days from the date hereof. However, the respondents shall not take any further coercive action against the petitioner, in respect of the impugned demand, till the conclusion of the Appeal. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application(s). Judge Judge Amjad
